Gluten-Free Breakfast Cereals

Deliciously Gluten-Free!

Discover the JERRY series by Nerano – healthy, tasty, and 100% gluten-free breakfast cereals for the entire family.

Our Products

Jerry Breakfast Cereals

Jerry – Inspired by a Passion
for Gluten-Free Taste!

We used to think that a gluten-free breakfast had to be tasteless and joyless. That was before Jerry appeared! Our „Jerry" breakfast cereal line is the fruit of our long-standing passion and experience in creating healthy, delicious food.

  • Jerry is the result of our experiments and passion for finding the perfect recipe. We wanted to create something that would be ideal not only for people with gluten intolerance, but also for everyone who loves tasty and healthy breakfasts.

  • We knew that many children struggle with food intolerances. Jerry is our answer to these challenges, created with the youngest foodies in mind, who deserve a delicious and healthy breakfast.

  • In most breakfast cereals, the main ingredient is gluten. In „Jerry", the main ingredient is love for taste and a healthy lifestyle. No gluten is our recipe for a delicious breakfast.

  • Every step in creating „Jerry" is full of passion. For us, naturalness is the key to healthy taste, which is why our gluten-free flakes contain no unnecessary ingredients. Their composition is characterized by simplicity and transparency.

Jerry is more than breakfast cereal. It's a piece of our heart that we want to share with you and your family. Try „Jerry" and join our gluten-free revolution full of flavor and joy!

#JerryGlutenFree #ForKids #GlutenFreeTaste #HealthyBreakfast #TasteWithoutGluten
Choco Balls Choco Smiles Choco Shells Honey Rings Cinnamon Shells Strawberry Balls Vanilla Balls

We respond to consumer needs in the Free From category!

Health Benefits

Carefully selected premium ingredients provide excellent health benefits. No artificial flavors or colors.

Taste

Equal to gluten-containing products. Superior taste compared to other gluten-free products.

Choice

Consumers receive unique, innovative options instead of limitations. The only brand fulfilling unmet consumer needs in the gluten-free cereals category.

Our Product Range

JERRY Choco Balls

New 375g Gluten-Free Vegan No Added Sugar High Fibre

Intense chocolate-flavored balls.

Free from:
  • Gluten
  • Wheat Starch
  • Lactose
  • Eggs
  • Milk
  • Nuts
  • Palm Oil
  • Glucose Syrup
  • GMO
  • Preservatives
  • Soy

About us

Who are we?

First and foremost, we are a group of people who not only understand the market from a business perspective, but also know how to listen to every consumer.

This is precisely what sets us apart from the competition – we are not just another company stumbling through the fog of sales. We respond to the growing awareness of consumers and ensure that their needs become reality, not just wishful thinking. Thanks to the vast industry experience of our entire team and an understanding of the needs of every player in the sales cycle – from wholesalers to individual customers – we are able to identify products destined for sales success.

Consumer convenience

Consumers have no trouble finding the products we bring to market.

We offer sales through our own online store and work with small-format shops, deli chains, super- and hypermarket chains, and petrol stations.

Modern trade

Marketing solutions making the most of the tools of our time.

Collaboration with key players in individual sales sectors, continuous research, and immediate response to market needs – all of this allows us not only to fill niches, but also to enter markets that appear saturated.

Import-Export

Our goal is to fill the market and introduce the diversity we know from Western markets.

An end to the dominance of well-known brands – Polish consumers deserve the power of choice. But we don't stop at the Polish market. We also want to help our eastern and southern neighbours satisfy this dynamic industry. Together, our ambitions will become reality.
